title: GLM-5.2 (Fully Tested): I got EARLY ACCESS & This MODEL is CRAZY!
summary: GLM-5.2 is an improved model from Z AI featuring a 1 million token context window, expected open-weight release with MIT license, and integration with coding tools. It achieves around 81.43 on coding benchmarks, approximately 6 percent below Opus 4.8, and is offered through the GLM Coding Plan at approximately $8 per month.
writeup: The video covers GLM-5.2 from Z AI, tested under early access. It documents a 1 million token context window, an expected open-weight release under the MIT license, and integration with coding tools. The model scores around 81.43 on coding benchmarks, roughly 6 percent below Opus 4.8, and is available through the GLM Coding Plan at approximately $8 per month.
